patterns: Crew & personality content dominates: 18 of 125 outliers feature people over products
Trend participation is high-ROI: 5 outliers rode TikTok trends to outsized reach
Behind-the-scenes aviation content has a built-in audience: 44 outliers showcase operations/aircraft
Passenger stories drive the highest share rates across all airlines
Budget carriers (Spirit, Frontier, EasyJet) thrive with self-aware humor and personality
flairRecommendations: Launch a recurring crew content series — crew-led TikToks are the single most consistent performer across all airline sizes
Lean into budget identity with humor — Spirit and Frontier prove self-aware budget brands build cult TikTok followings
Prioritize speed over polish: trend participation with fast turnaround outperforms high-production content
Capture every operational milestone: inaugural flights, new routes, and fleet additions are content gold
Empower crew and gate agents to capture real moments — UGC-style content outperforms studio content 3:1
Build a content capture protocol for live events, route launches, and passenger interactions

outliers.flairTakeaway: Cinematic destination content paired with a specific route drives massive reach. Flair's version: Short destination reel for Flair's Vancouver to Cancun or Edmonton to Puerto Vallarta. Beautiful footage, simple caption, let the destination do the talking.

New route announcements wrapped in destination storytelling outperform plain announcements. Flair's version: Flair's Montreal to Jamaica or Toronto to Guadalajara announced the same way. Dreamy destination footage, bilingual caption, the route is the hook.

outliers.text:
Sip and soar even more, with free beer, wine and snacks on all flights! 🍻✈️
For full details, visit the link in bio.
//
De quoi agrémenter votre voyage! Collations, bières et vins offerts gratuitement à bord de tous les vols! 🍻✈️
Pour connaître tous les détails, visitez le lien dans notre bio.
outliers.flairTakeaway: Onboard experience upgrades announced as simple, shareable moments drive views. Flair's version: Announcing a new route or the crew celebrating a new improvement or milestone. Real reactions, real energy.

Teaser content with national pride builds anticipation and shares. Flair's version: Tease Flair's next big route launch or fleet milestone with Canadian flag energy. Build-up content before the reveal.

outliers.text: Big dreams, big reveal. 🌍 Proud to introduce Team Air Canada, heading to Milano Cortina to represent @teamcanada and @cdnparalympics at Milano Cortina 2026. #FlyTheFlag 🇨🇦
outliers.flairTakeaway: National pride content with athletes and team moments drives massive reach. Flair's version: Crew announcing a big hockey score mid-flight as the game is happening, or passengers flying to Vancouver for the FIFA World Cup. Live sports energy captured in the cabin.

outliers.text: Welcome aboard, travelers. Next stop…Star Wars: Galaxy’s Edge.
outliers.flairTakeaway: Pop culture themed flights create scroll-stopping, highly shareable content. Flair's version: Flair themed flight for a Canadian cultural moment. Hockey playoff flight, holiday themed cabin, crew dressed up for Halloween. The event becomes the content.

outliers.text: Porg fans not included on future flights but you can BYOP (bring your own Porg) ⭐️ 🪐🛸🚀✨
outliers.flairTakeaway: Mascot and character content with humor generates massive engagement and shares. Flair's version: Flair crew interacting with a fun prop or mascot on board. Could be a stuffed moose, a hockey puck, anything distinctly Canadian and playful.

outliers.text: We asked an AI Bot to write us a Big Game commercial and…let’s just say we have a few notes. How about you @tanfrance?
outliers.flairTakeaway: Timely cultural commentary with a celebrity cameo creates viral moments. Flair's version: Flair reacts to an AI-generated Flair ad or trending cultural moment. Crew watches and reacts. Low production, high personality.

outliers.text: It’s got that new plane smell!🔑✈️ #travel #traveltiktok #aircraft #aviation #plane
outliers.flairTakeaway: New aircraft content with enthusiasm and personality drives aviation audience engagement. Flair's version: Flair's brand-new 737 MAX walkthrough. Crew showing off the cabin, that new plane smell energy. Most Canadians don't know Flair flies new planes.

outliers.text: Good news for cheese lovers: we’re spreading the love. 🧀✨ Our signature Fruit & Cheese Platter is now available for preorder on more routes (starting at 670 miles). More flights = more cheese. #NationalCheeseDay
outliers.flairTakeaway: Food and snack content framed with personality outperforms standard product announcements. Flair's version: Flair crew taste-testing and rating all the onboard snacks. Honest reactions, rankings, crew favorites.

outliers.text: new in-flight activities unlocked for skymiles members. available on all flights by the end of 2024, terms of use apply #deltaairlines
outliers.flairTakeaway: Teasing new in-flight features as exclusive unlocks creates curiosity and massive views. Flair's version: Flair teasing a new onboard feature or experience. Short, mysterious, let the audience guess. Works even for small upgrades.

outliers.text: call it Futurecore. at the Delta Sustainable Skies Lab, someday is every day. 🌤️✨ visit the link in our bio to learn more.
outliers.flairTakeaway: Cinematic sustainability content with a cool aesthetic drives views beyond the usual audience. Flair's version: Flair's operational efficiency story told cinematically. 99% completion factor, newest fleet in Canada, reduced emissions. Make it look cool.

outliers.text: ✨coming soon✨ Group Drop, the new way for Members to access events on SkyMiles Experiences. grab a friend and enter for a chance to win unforgettable experiences together – no miles needed. visit skymilesexperiences.com to get notified about the first drop and for full rules. trust us, you'll want i
outliers.flairTakeaway: Exclusive experience teasers create aspirational engagement and shares. Flair's version: Flair offering a unique experience tied to a destination. Win a trip to Cancun, backstage at a concert in Montreal. The experience is the content.

outliers.text: rule number 1: don’t leave mom on read. rule number 2: enjoy free wi-fi on domestic flights when you join skymiles #deltaairlines
outliers.flairTakeaway: Relatable humor paired with a product feature makes announcements feel native to TikTok. Flair's version: Relatable passenger moments like "Don't let Mom pack eight pairs of shoes in her carry-on, we will get charged." Real humor from real travel situations.

outliers.text: we pinky promise it’s here - free wi-fi is rolling out now 🫶 #deltaairlines #freewifi
outliers.flairTakeaway: Simple, personality-driven product announcements with trending energy outperform corporate reveals. Flair's version: We promise to get you to the people you need to see, on time. 99% completion rate, best on-time in Canada. Crew delivering the message with warmth and confidence.

outliers.text: For years, John Leonard tried to get a jet. Frontier finally made it happen. Now, John is stocked up with 7 million Miles and plenty of @Coca-Cola.
outliers.flairTakeaway: Storytelling that ties into cultural moments and fulfills a passenger dream creates earned reach. Flair's version: Find the Flair passenger with a great story. The grandma flying for the first time, the kid who loves planes, the family reuniting. Real stories, real people.

outliers.text:
Our All-You-Can-Fly Annual Pass is HERE! Get unlimited travel for only $499*! ✈️  Learn more by visiting the 🔗 in our bio. 

*Seats are limited. Terms and conditions apply.
outliers.flairTakeaway: Bold, disruptive product announcements generate massive shares when the offer itself is the hook. Flair's version: Flair announcing a bold offer or new product with crew excitement. Film the team reacting to the announcement, not just a graphic.

outliers.text: just can’t say no to that $19* flight #dontputtheblameonme #flyfrontier #frontierairlines #fyp #planetiktok #aviationlovers #CapCut #traveltiktok #traveltips #travelling #travel2023 #cheapflights #flyingtips #flyinghacks
outliers.flairTakeaway: Trending audio paired with a simple brand moment drives outsized reach through the algorithm. Flair's version: Poking fun at flying Flair again. A little self-deprecating humor about the legacy reputation, showing that things have changed. Laugh at the old Flair, celebrate the new one.

outliers.text:
Graduating kindergarten calls for a sky-high celebration. 🎉

When Xavier missed his kindergarten graduation due to traveling out of town, our flight attendants stepped in to surprise him with a special in-flight ceremony. 

Congratulations, Xavier!

🎥: @xkids_mommy 

#flyfrontier #frontierairlines #
outliers.flairTakeaway: Surprise passenger celebrations captured in-flight drive the highest share rates in airline TikTok. Flair's version: Flair crew surprising a young boy or girl who dreams of being a pilot, letting them sit in the cockpit for the first time.

outliers.text: Can you reach me? No, you can’t.  #flyfrontier #frontierairlines #aviationlovers #nobodysheardfrommeformonths #imdoingbetterthanieverwas #gowildallyoucanfly #travellife #travelbucketlist #summertravel #traveltiktok #aviationlovers #traveltips
outliers.flairTakeaway: Trending audio layered over simple airline footage is high-ROI content with minimal production. Flair's version: Canadian trending audio over Flair footage. Avril Lavigne's "Complicated" over a smooth boarding sequence, or a Canadian hit synced to takeoff. Keep it Canadian, keep it fun.

outliers.text:
They’re Hawaiian Airlines flight attendants… ✈️💜🌺

#HawaiianAirlines #PualaniProud #FlightAttendant #Aviation #Hawaii #fyp #flightattendantlife
outliers.flairTakeaway: Crew pride reveals with trending audio and uniform showcase drive massive engagement. Flair's version: They're Flair Airlines flight attendants. Same format, Flair crew, Flair green uniform, crew personality on full display.

outliers.text:
POV: you land in Hawaiʻi. 🌺✈️

#hawaii #travel #hawaiianairlines #fyp #aviation #avgeek
outliers.flairTakeaway: POV arrival content at a desirable destination is simple, repeatable, and high-performing. Flair's version: POV: you land in Cancun. POV: you land in Montego Bay. Window footage, crew greeting, first steps off the plane. Repeat for every destination.

outliers.text:
So awesome😌✨

#HawaiianAirlines #FirstClass #Pog
#Travel #Hawaii #VacationMode
outliers.flairTakeaway: In-flight experience content that shows the actual seat and cabin generates curiosity views. Flair's version: "So awesome" audio over a crew member opening the cabin door to a full plane, a passenger seeing their window view for the first time, or crew doing something unexpectedly cool on board.

outliers.text:
Looking for something fun to add to your Hawai‘i itinerary? Here are our followers’ responses when asked what their favorite local activities are.🤿 

#LovingLocal #SummerActivities #ExploreHawaii
outliers.flairTakeaway: Crowdsourced destination tips from followers builds community and drives saves. Flair's version: Ask Flair followers: what's your favorite thing to do in Cancun? Montreal? Kelowna? Turn the answers into a video. Community builds content.

outliers.text:
Just being honest, we have all done it💁🏻‍♀️✈️

#HawaiianAirlines #Traveling #VacationMode #Oahu #Hawaii
outliers.flairTakeaway: Relatable travel humor with a simple caption drives shares because everyone sees themselves in it. Flair's version: POV: you're flying Flair to Cancun for the 10th time this year and you're not even sorry. The repeat flyer who knows exactly what they're doing.

outliers.text:
Our TrueBlue customer, Gurnaj, really said: challenge accepted. 

Congrats to being the first to finish our #jetblue25for25 promotion. ✈️  Link in bio to learn more.
outliers.flairTakeaway: Spotlighting real loyal customers by name creates authentic engagement and community pride. Flair's version: Spotlight a real frequent Flair flyer. Name them, tell their story, celebrate their loyalty. Real passengers are more compelling than any campaign.

outliers.text: Press play on your next adventure. 🎮 Created in partnership with @geoguessr, travel the world without leaving your seat. See if you can guess the destinations we fly to by tapping the link in bio. #JetBlueGuesstination
outliers.flairTakeaway: Interactive game content tied to destinations drives engagement and time-on-post. Flair's version: Press play on your next adventure. Show a street, a road, a view from a Flair destination and have people guess where it is. Cancun side street, Montreal alley, Montego Bay beach road. That's your next adventure.

outliers.text: An islander, born and raised🗽
outliers.flairTakeaway: City pride content with a bold, short caption drives local audience engagement and shares. Flair's version: Edmonton born and raised. Toronto through and through. Calgary to the core. City pride content for every Flair base city.

outliers.text: Gave the Gen Z employee an opportunity and he flew with it…
outliers.flairTakeaway: Gen Z crew content with humor and personality resonates with TikTok's core audience. Flair's version: Flair's CEO walks into the room and says "I need a fun idea for our new Jamaica route" and the Gen Z crew member pitches increasingly unhinged ideas. Boardroom meets chaos energy.

outliers.text: They passed security. They made the cart. They’re stealing the spotlight. 🍪✈️🔥 Coming to a snack cart near you this May. #SnackCartRefresh
outliers.flairTakeaway: Snack and food reveals framed with personality and hype generate surprising engagement. Flair's version: Flair's onboard menu or new snack options revealed with crew energy. Taste test format, crew reactions, make the small things feel exciting. Key takeaway from JetBlue: their social team deeply understands pop culture and trends, and that fluency is what makes their content land.

outliers.text: We were honored to fly our loyal friend and hero, Kaya, home to rest after a lifetime of hard work. Throughout her career, Kaya flew with us over 250 times to help establish the PAWS Act which united Veterans with service dogs. We are so grateful to be a part of her legacy, and we thank her and her
outliers.flairTakeaway: Deeply emotional passenger stories are the highest-performing content format in all of airline TikTok. Flair's version: Find the emotional Flair stories. The service dog, the veteran, the family flying together for the first time. These stories exist on every flight.

outliers.text:
Talk about precious cargo 🥰

#southwestheart #southwestfamily #pilotlife #fatherdaughter
outliers.flairTakeaway: Crew family moments captured on camera create instant emotional connection with audiences. Flair's version: Flair pilot flying with their kid on board. Crew member's parent taking their first Flair flight. Family moments from inside the operation.

outliers.text: Petition to make RJ the official Southwest greeter? #traveltok #hi #southwestheart
outliers.flairTakeaway: Recurring character content with a standout personality builds audience loyalty and return viewers. Flair's version: A kid greeting passengers at the gate, a child obsessed with planes watching from the window, a young aviation fan meeting the captain. Kids on flights are naturally heartwarming and shareable.

outliers.text:
🗣��Now boarding for SEC country! 

We’re proud to announce that we are now the official airline of the @SEC and @SECNetwork. Who will you be cheering for this year? 🏈
#football #collegefootball #sec #travel #southwest
outliers.flairTakeaway: Sports partnership content taps into massive existing fan audiences for outsized reach. Flair's version: Flair partnering with a Canadian sports moment. CFL, hockey, local teams. Film crew wearing jerseys, passengers heading to the game.

outliers.text:
You’re going to want to watch this video until the end, trust us🥹❤️💙💛
#feelgood #goodnews #heart #flightattendant #traveltok #dreamscometrue
outliers.flairTakeaway: Feel-good crew stories told with emotion and a payoff ending drive shares and saves. Flair's version: A passenger tells the crew their dream job or bucket list item, and the crew makes it happen mid-flight. Passenger wants to be a flight attendant? Hand them the apron. Wants to make an announcement? Give them the mic.

outliers.text:
⚠️🛫MAJOR NEW PLANE ALERT🛫⚠️

We’re welcoming our first Airbus A321neo to our growing fleet! A321’s are the largest planes in Spirit’s Fit Fleet, and with the new NEO engine option, we can fly further and quieter while reducing our emissions.
outliers.flairTakeaway: New aircraft reveals with genuine crew excitement drive massive aviation audience engagement. Flair's version: Flair welcoming a new 737 MAX to the fleet. Crew lined up, water cannon salute, first walkthrough. Fleet pride content with real energy.

outliers.text:
IYKYK 😉
#spirit #holyairball #holyfreakingairball #travel #flights
outliers.flairTakeaway: Trending audio with a cryptic caption drives curiosity views and comment engagement. Flair's version: Use the "holy airball" format to flip wrong assumptions about Flair. "So you fly Flair?" assumption: it's always late. Reveal: 99% completion rate. Play on what people think they know versus reality.

outliers.text: God forbid we have your back #spirit #godforbid
outliers.flairTakeaway: Self-aware humor that acknowledges the brand's reputation turns criticism into content. Flair's version: Flair owning its reputation with humor. God forbid we fly you there on time (99% completion rate). Turn the narrative with confidence.

outliers.text: Stir the pot and comment why you like flying with us 🤷 #spirit #stirthepot
outliers.flairTakeaway: Engagement bait that invites the audience to defend the brand drives comments and algorithmic push. Flair's version: Stir the pot: comment why you fly Flair. Let loyal passengers defend the brand in the comments. The community does the marketing.

outliers.text: yellow suits us #aviation #aviationhistorymonth #spirit #plane
outliers.flairTakeaway: Brand color and identity pride content with simple aviation footage builds brand recognition. Flair's version: Green suits us. Flair's green livery on the tarmac, crew in uniform, the brand color everywhere. Simple, proud, brand-building.

outliers.text: two peas in a plane #unitedairlines #traveltiktok #bestfriend #flightattendants
outliers.flairTakeaway: Crew friendship content with trending audio is simple, warm, and consistently high-performing. Flair's version: Two Flair crew members who are best friends. Film them together on a flight, at the gate, on layover. Crew friendship is relatable content.

outliers.text:
happy early birthday, we got you your own airport personal assistant📱

🎥: @LAXtoLuxury ✈️ Michelle #Travel #TravelTips #App #UnitedAirlines
outliers.flairTakeaway: Creator-filmed product reviews feel more authentic than brand-produced content. Flair's version: Send a Canadian travel creator through the Flair experience. Let them film it their way. Their audience trusts their lens more than Flair's.

outliers.text: where we flying besties?! #Flight #Traveling #Airline #TravelTok #ThisOrThat #Destination #fyp
outliers.flairTakeaway: Interactive this-or-that destination content drives comments and repeat views. Flair's version: Where are we flying, Flair fam? Cancun or Montego Bay? Montreal or Halifax? This-or-that with Flair's actual routes. Let the crew pick.

outliers.text: think portrait, not landscape 🧳 #Airplane #UnitedAirlines #Aviation #Travel #Traveling #TravelHack #CarryOn #Luggage #fyp
outliers.flairTakeaway: Practical packing and travel hack content drives saves and shares because it's genuinely useful. Flair's version: Crew reacting to passengers doing things right. Bag fits perfectly in the overhead bin, personal item slides under the seat first try. Trending audio over the crew's satisfaction. Relatable for crew and passengers.

outliers.text: you’re not flying until you’re flying with @Aly and AJ ✈️ #potentialbreakupsong
outliers.flairTakeaway: Celebrity or creator surprise moments on board create viral, shareable content. Flair's version: Crew reenacting a Canadian music video on the plane. Soul Decision's "Faded" with crew lip-syncing and passengers as the audience. Longer-form, fun, distinctly Canadian.

outliers.text: There are plenty of reasons to travel, and if you needed another, ✈️🌍 check out our link in bio. #WestJet #Travel #Sale #WhyWeTravel
outliers.flairTakeaway: Travel montage content with an emotional pull outperforms standard sale announcements. Flair's version: Why Canadians travel with Flair. Montage of real destinations, real passengers, real moments. Emotion first, the booking link can wait.

outliers.text:
We tried to keep a secret and not tell a Seoul!
 
We are excited to announce that we will offer direct flights from Calgary to Seoul starting in May 2024! 
 
Enter the WestJet Feed Your Seoul sweepstakes for a chance to win a trip for 2 and come Seoul searching in South Korea with us.
outliers.flairTakeaway: Route announcements with personality and wordplay make corporate news feel human. Flair's version: Flair's Jamaica or Montreal route announced with a pun, crew excitement, destination reveal. Make the announcement feel like a moment.

outliers.text:
Follow our WestJetters' lead and jump into summer! 

Wherever your journey takes you, we hope it's your best summer yet! ✈️☀️ 

#WestJet #FirstDayofSummer #SummerAdventures #TravelWithUs
outliers.flairTakeaway: Seasonal crew energy content marks calendar moments and builds brand warmth. Flair's version: Flair crew jumping into summer using a viral transition format. Uniform to swimsuit, tarmac to beach, winter coat to sunglasses. Seasonal energy with a clean transition.

outliers.text: Helpful tip heading into the long weekend! 💡🧳 #traveltip #traveltok #westjet
outliers.flairTakeaway: Quick, practical travel tips timed to holidays drive saves and shares. Flair's version: Flair crew sharing a quick travel tip before a long weekend. Practical, helpful, 15 seconds. Builds trust and saves.

outliers.text: Where are you headed on your next getaway? ☺️✈️ #WestJet
outliers.flairTakeaway: Simple community questions drive comments and algorithmic distribution through engagement. Flair's version: All the Flair crew waving at camera, simple text: "We can't wait to take you to Cancun" or "We can't wait to take you to Jamaica." Warm, human, destination-specific. Rotate for every new route.

outliers.text: We’ve landed on TikTok (and we’ve got a new look) 👋 👀 #BritishAirways #BA #Aviation #Uniform #Fyp
outliers.flairTakeaway: Platform debut content paired with a visual reveal creates a strong first impression. Flair's version: If Flair relaunches its TikTok voice, make it a moment. New energy, new look, crew front and center. A voice debut, not just another post.

outliers.text:
@Lewis Capaldi  🤝 ultimate cabin crew. Lewis gave us a sneak peek of his upcoming single ‘Wish You The Best’ ✈️🎶🎸

#LewisCapaldi #BritishAirways #WishYouTheBest #CabinCrew
outliers.flairTakeaway: Surprise celebrity moments on board create massive earned media and shares. Flair's version: A Canadian artist performing or appearing on a Flair flight. Doesn't need to be A-list. A local musician, a comedian, a creator. The surprise is the format.

outliers.text:
Spotted: the @Charles Leclerc of the aviation world 😳 Fancy a race @ferrari? 🏁🏆🏎️ @Formula 1 
#BritishAirways #ScuderiaFerrari #Formula1 #CharlesLeclerc #LightsOutAndAwayWeGo #Airbus #A380
outliers.flairTakeaway: Playful cross-brand comparisons with trending cultural figures drive curiosity clicks. Flair's version: Flair 737 vs something unexpected. A race, a comparison, a playful challenge. Plane content with a twist.

outliers.text: We never go out of style ✈️😏 Customers on board flight BA275 to Las Vegas yesterday were treated to a special on board announcement ahead of Super Bowl Sunday! #BritishAirways #SuperBowl #TaylorSwift #CabinCrew #Swifties #LasVegas #TravisKelce
outliers.flairTakeaway: Tying crew moments to live cultural events creates timely, shareable content. Flair's version: Flair crew making a special announcement tied to a cultural moment. Concert weekend, playoff game, holiday. Tie the flight to the event.

outliers.text:
Looking neat 🔥 Our next-generation short-haul seats have landed on G-TNED, our new A321neo aircraft ✈️

#BritishAirways #A321 #Aircraft #PlaneSeats #TooSweet
outliers.flairTakeaway: New seat and cabin product reveals drive aviation audience engagement and curiosity. Flair's version: Flair's newest cabin configuration or seat upgrade revealed by crew. Walk through it, sit in it, show the details. Product content through people.

outliers.text: We’re thrilled to be a National Partner of The Eurovision Song Contest 2023 and proud to support this celebration of diversity & musical creativity across Europe 🎤🎉 Stay tuned for exciting updates and giveaways including VIP tickets to the grand finale and free flights 🎵🕺😍✈️
outliers.flairTakeaway: Major event partnerships create content moments that tap into existing massive audiences. Flair's version: Flair partnering with a Canadian cultural event. Stampede, Caribana, Jazz Fest, a music festival. The event's audience becomes Flair's audience.

outliers.text: Are we nearly there yet? 🤔 #fyp #aviation #airline #easyjet #easyjetcrew #viral #cabincrewlife #cabincrew #avgeek #tiktoktravel #traveltok
outliers.flairTakeaway: Simple crew humor filmed in the cabin with a relatable caption is endlessly repeatable. Flair's version: Flair crew doing a quick relatable moment in the cabin. Short, funny, no script needed. Are we there yet energy.

outliers.text: Game changer? We think so 📱🧡 #travelhack #phonehack # #airline #easyjet #easyjetcrew #viral  #cabincrew #avgeek #tiktoktravel #traveltok
outliers.flairTakeaway: Crew-filmed travel hacks feel authentic and drive massive saves and shares. Flair's version: Flair crew sharing a phone hack, packing tip, or airport shortcut. Crew as the expert, filmed on their phone. Authentic and useful.

outliers.text: Our office > your office 🤌 #airline #fyp #easyjet #easyjetcrew #viral #cabincrewlife #cabincrew #aviation #avgeek
outliers.flairTakeaway: Crew POV content showing their unique workplace view is simple, repeatable, and aspirational. Flair's version: Flair crew showing off their office view with Luna Mezzo Mare and the 🤌 energy. Cockpit over the Rockies, tarmac at sunset, cabin at sunrise. Chef's kiss, every time.

outliers.text:
Put it in the Louvre x

#JaneBoulton #Airline #Hopecore #easyJet @Jane Boulton
outliers.flairTakeaway: The contrast between dramatic music and mundane operational truth is a repeatable comedy format. Flair's version: Crew delivering everyday airline realities with a deadpan face over an overly emotional soundtrack. The format is the joke. Different facts, same energy.

outliers.text:
We know Iceland seems unreal, but some folks are taking it a bit too far. Is Iceland real, or just the world’s prettiest conspiracy? 🕵️
Come and see for yourself ✈️ 

#iceland #icelandair #unreal #travel #traveltok
outliers.flairTakeaway: Playful, self-aware brand humor that leans into a meme creates viral destination content. Flair's version: Is affordable Canadian travel real, or just the world's best-kept secret? Playful, self-aware, leaning into the disbelief that good fares exist.

outliers.text:
We asked the Yule Cat to taste traditional Icelandic Christmas food. We apologize in advance.

#icelandair #iceland #yulecat #icelandicfolklore #storytime
outliers.flairTakeaway: Recurring character content tied to cultural traditions builds a loyal returning audience. Flair's version: Mock interview with someone dressed as a carry-on bag. "So tell us about yourself." "I'm 6 by 13 by 17, I weigh 15 pounds, and I'm always free." Deadpan, defensive, the bag has opinions.

outliers.text:
The Icelandic Yule Cat has quite the backstory. Buckle up!

#icelandair #iceland #yulecat #icelandicfolklore #storytime
outliers.flairTakeaway: Storytelling content that educates about culture and place builds deeper destination connection. Flair's version: The carry-on bag lore continues. "They say if you don't measure me before you get to the gate, bad things happen." Same mock interview energy, building the character across episodes.

outliers.text:
From comfort to entertainment, we‘ve got you covered... unless you‘re asking for whatever the Yule Cat just asked for.

#icelandair #iceland #yulecat #yulecat #icelandicfolklore #storytime
outliers.flairTakeaway: Character-driven content that showcases onboard features in a narrative format keeps audiences engaged. Flair's version: The carry-on bag tries the onboard experience. Sits in the seat, rates the legroom, orders a snack. The character explores the plane.

outliers.text:
We know Iceland looks unreal, but sir… please. Go pose with a puffin. Can someone out there confirm we are, in fact, real? 👀🔎 🌀

#iceland #icelandair #unreal #conspiracy #travel #unrealiceland
outliers.flairTakeaway: Series content that extends a viral concept keeps momentum and builds franchise value. Flair's version: If something works, make it a series. Same format, new angle, recurring theme. Flair's version of an ongoing joke or concept that audiences follow.

outliers.text:
Weekend mode on – where are you heading this weekend?
#Lufthansa
outliers.flairTakeaway: Simple, beautiful aviation footage with a mood caption drives massive passive views. Flair's version: Flair 737 footage. Takeoff, landing, cruising over mountains. Weekend mode on, Friday mood, holiday energy. Beautiful footage, simple caption.

outliers.text:
Where will you fly for your Northern Lights adventure? 

#Lufthansa #Aurora #NorthernLights
outliers.flairTakeaway: Spectacular natural phenomenon tied to destination creates aspirational, save-worthy content. Flair's version: Northern lights from Edmonton, sunsets from Victoria, mountain views from Vancouver or Whistler. Flair flies to places with genuinely stunning natural moments.

outliers.text: Phonetics: 1, Plans: 0. Well, I‘m happy either way. 💁 #Lufthansa #travel #destinations #fly
outliers.flairTakeaway: Relatable travel humor about mispronouncing destinations is universally shareable. Flair's version: Flair passengers trying to pronounce Guadalajara, or debating how to say Montreal vs Montréal. Light, funny, universally relatable.

outliers.text: Traveling with a baby? 👶 No worries! ♥️✈️#lufthansaviews #lufthansa #baby #traveling #travel
outliers.flairTakeaway: Family travel content that normalizes flying with babies drives engagement from parent audiences. Flair's version: Flying with the family? At least you picked the cheapest airline. Lean into the reality of family travel on a budget with humor and honesty.

outliers.text: Spürbar mehr Komfort in allen Reiseklassen genießen. Ein neues Flugerlebnis mit Lufthansa Allegris.
outliers.flairTakeaway: Premium product reveals with cinematic production create aspirational brand content. Flair's version: Film the Flair experience like it's a luxury airline ad. Cinematic slow-mo of the middle seat, dramatic music over a bag of pretzels, epic lighting on the tray table. The joke is the contrast between the production value and the budget experience.

outliers.text: See the world differently 🌍
outliers.flairTakeaway: Brand values content with a clear, bold message creates identity-defining moments. Flair's version: Flair's version of a brand values statement. Travel is for everyone. Affordable doesn't mean less. A bold, visual brand moment.

outliers.text: You deserve to travel without judgement ✈️❤️ #seetheworlddifferently #travel #virginatlantic
outliers.flairTakeaway: Inclusivity messaging delivered visually and emotionally drives shares and brand loyalty. Flair's version: Showcasing the diversity of Flair's crew. Different backgrounds, different styles, different stories, one team. Let the crew represent who they are.

outliers.text: Good vibes only 👠✈️ #virginatlantic #cabincrew #fyp
outliers.flairTakeaway: Crew confidence and style content with trending audio builds brand personality and aspiration. Flair's version: Flair crew walking through the airport or cabin with confidence and energy. Trending audio, crew style, good vibes. Let the crew shine.

outliers.text: Everyone’s a VIP 😍 #VirginAtlantic #Travel #CabinCrew
outliers.flairTakeaway: Content showing equal treatment for all passengers builds brand warmth and shareability. Flair's version: Everyone gets the Flair experience. Show crew treating every passenger like they matter. Affordable travel with genuine hospitality.

outliers.text: We’re celebrating individuality so from today, our crew can wear their tattoos with pride ❤️ #CabinCrew #VirginAtlantic #FYP
outliers.flairTakeaway: Progressive policy changes announced through crew create massive positive engagement. Flair's version: Any positive crew or company policy change announced through the people it affects. Crew telling their own story about what it means to them.

outliers.text:
Captain Claus, requesting permission for take-off. 

Merry Christmas from Emirates. 🎅🏼 🎁 

#Emirates #FlyBetter #A380 #Christmas
outliers.flairTakeaway: Holiday themed aviation content with cinematic production creates annual viral moments. Flair's version: Flair's holiday content. Crew in holiday spirit, festive cabin, Christmas flight to a sun destination. Holiday energy, crew-filmed.

outliers.text:
You don’t see this everyday. 👀

Watch our pilots perform a spectacular formation flyover with three aircraft to open Dubai Airshow 2025.

#Emirates #A380 #A350 #777 #Flyover
outliers.flairTakeaway: Spectacular aviation footage of rare operational moments drives massive avgeek engagement. Flair's version: Flair's version of a rare aviation moment. First landing at a new airport, fleet lineup, special livery reveal. The operational spectacle.

outliers.text:
Introducing the Sleigh380. Santa's going long-haul this year!

Merry Christmas from Emirates. 🎅🎄🎁

#Emirates #A380 #Aviation #Christmas
outliers.flairTakeaway: Sequel holiday content that builds on a previous viral hit sustains audience engagement year over year. Flair's version: If a Flair holiday post works, do it again next year with a twist. Build annual traditions in content. Audiences love returning formats.

outliers.text:
This trend but make it First Class.

#Emirates #FirstClass #TravelTok #PlaneTok #LuxuryTravel #SurroundSound
outliers.flairTakeaway: Trending audio adapted to show the in-flight experience drives curiosity and aspirational engagement. Flair's version: This trend but make it Flair. Trending audio with the Flair cabin, Flair crew, Flair destinations. Same trend, Flair's world.

outliers.text:
Our passion for travel is in full bloom. 🌹 

Happy Valentine’s Day from Emirates. 

#Emirates #ValentinesDay #Love #A380 #Aviation
outliers.flairTakeaway: Holiday-specific content that ties the brand to an emotion creates shareable seasonal moments. Flair's version: Flair's Valentine's content. Couples traveling together, crew spreading love, romantic destinations. Tie the holiday to the travel emotion.

outliers.text: I do 💍 😌
outliers.flairTakeaway: Life milestone content filmed on board creates deeply emotional, highly shareable moments. Flair's version: Flair passengers celebrating life milestones on board. Engagement, honeymoon trip, anniversary flight. Ask crew to spot and capture these.

outliers.text: Welcome on board our Etihad A321LR ✈️  Flat beds all around and a hello for each one 👋 #cabincrew
outliers.flairTakeaway: Crew greeting passengers warmly and personally creates aspirational hospitality content. Flair's version: Flair crew each saying hello in the different languages they speak. English, French, Spanish, Tagalog, Punjabi, Arabic, whatever the crew brings. Canada's diversity shown through Flair's crew.

outliers.text: Welcome On board 👋 #cabincrew
outliers.flairTakeaway: Repeating a successful format with slight variation compounds audience and views. Flair's version: Same multilingual crew greeting format, different flight, different crew members, different languages. Repeat what works with fresh faces each time.

outliers.text: Europe awaits! Book now and let your European adventure begin! #europe #summer
outliers.flairTakeaway: Seasonal aspiration content tied to a destination region drives saves and shares. Flair's version: Mexico awaits. The Caribbean is calling. Summer in BC. Flair's version of seasonal destination aspiration, tied to real routes.

outliers.text: with a croissant 🥐 #paris #travel #etihad
outliers.flairTakeaway: Simple destination lifestyle moments with minimal caption drive massive views through mood and aesthetic. Flair's version: With a taco in Cancun. With a smoked meat sandwich in Montreal. Simple, beautiful destination moments. One line, one vibe.

outliers.text:
Feel the rhythm with our official FIFA World Cup™️ song, ‘C.H.A.M.P.I.O.N.S’. 

View the video on our YouTube channel, listen to the lyrics and prepare for the greatest football show on earth. #QatarAirways #FIFAWorldCup #Qatar2022
outliers.flairTakeaway: Official event soundtrack content taps into massive existing fan audiences. Flair's version: Tie content to the FIFA World Cup coming to Vancouver. Passengers flying in for the matches, crew hyping up game days, the energy of a global event landing in a Flair city.

outliers.text:
Check ✅ 

#QatarAirways #Aviation #Airbus
outliers.flairTakeaway: Satisfying aviation checklist content appeals to avgeeks and casual viewers alike. Flair's version: Flair pre-flight check. Cockpit prep, walk-around, systems check. Satisfying, methodical, trust-building aviation content.

outliers.text:
Tag your aviation friends who you would think know the answer! ✈️ 

#QatarAirways #Aviation #avgeek
outliers.flairTakeaway: Aviation trivia that invites tagging drives comments, shares, and algorithmic push. Flair's version: Flair aviation trivia. How fast does a 737 fly? How cold is it at cruising altitude? Tag a friend who would know. Engagement-first content.

outliers.text: @Champions League  🤝 Qatar Airways  We're heading to the UEFA Champions League as the new airline partner ⚽  A season of new highs awaits...   #QatarAirways #UCLxQR
outliers.flairTakeaway: Sports partnership content creates crossover audience reach beyond the airline's usual followers. Flair's version: Flair connected to a Canadian sports partnership. Local hockey team, CFL, university athletics. The sports audience discovers Flair.

outliers.text:
Of course we’re award-winning cabin crew ✈️ 

#QatarAirways #Aviation #CabinCrew #OfcourseTrend
outliers.flairTakeaway: Trending audio used to flex genuine brand achievements creates confident, shareable content. Flair's version: Of course Flair has 99% completion rate. Of course we're the most on-time airline in Canada. Trending audio + real flex.

outliers.text: Reminder: you can breathe ☁️
outliers.flairTakeaway: Ultra-simple calming aviation footage with a mindful caption drives massive passive views. Flair's version: Flair's calming content. Cloud footage from 35,000 feet, engine hum, window views. Peaceful, no sell, just the beauty of flying.

outliers.text: Turbines = Our kind of dopamine. #engine #aviation
outliers.flairTakeaway: Engine and aviation detail content satisfies the avgeek audience and drives saves. Flair's version: Flair's 737 engine spool-up, thrust reverser, or wing flex. Aviation detail content for the built-in avgeek audience.

outliers.text: What is your favorite part about pre-takeoff?
outliers.flairTakeaway: Simple question captions over aviation footage drive comments and repeat engagement. Flair's version: What's your favorite part of flying? Window or aisle? Takeoff or landing? Simple question, beautiful footage, let the comments roll.

outliers.text: Chasing views from 35,000 feet.
outliers.flairTakeaway: Window view content from altitude is endlessly repeatable and universally appealing. Flair's version: Views from a Flair window seat. Rockies, prairies, coastline, city lights at night. Different route, same format, every week.

outliers.text: Tag that bestie who chooses passport stamps over candles 🎂
outliers.flairTakeaway: Tag-a-friend content with a travel personality hook drives shares and comments. Flair's version: Tag a friend who would rather fly somewhere than get a gift. Travel personality content that invites sharing.

outliers.text:
Now that we’ve said hello, can we get a follow? 👀 ​
#FlySQ #SingaporeAirlines
outliers.flairTakeaway: Confident, personality-forward TikTok debuts set the tone for everything that follows. Flair's version: If Flair relaunches its TikTok voice, lead with confidence. A crew-led hello, a bold ask for the follow. Set the tone from post one.

outliers.text: Our experiences make us who we are. #WelcometoWorldClass #SingaporeAirlines #FlySQ
outliers.flairTakeaway: Short brand films that focus on the human experience of travel create emotional brand moments. Flair's version: Short film showing what travel means to Flair passengers. The first trip, the reunion, the adventure. Emotion over information.

outliers.text: It’s about finding joy in every moment. What ✨core memories✨ did you collect from your first trip? #InsideOut #SingaporeAirlines #FlySQ
outliers.flairTakeaway: Pop culture partnership content tied to a universal emotion drives shares across audiences. Flair's version: What core memories did you make on a Flair flight? Tie content to a cultural moment or universal emotion. Let passengers share their stories.

outliers.text: Join our fan club and hit the follow button! ❤️ #SingaporeAirlines #FlySQ
outliers.flairTakeaway: Direct community building CTAs with crew energy convert viewers into followers. Flair's version: Flair crew asking for the follow. Direct, confident, crew-led. Build the community one ask at a time.

outliers.text:
We are honoured to be named the World's Best Airline at the 2023 Skytrax World Airline Awards! We were also awarded Best First Class Airline, Best First Class Comfort Amenities, and Best Airline in Asia this year. 🥳🙌🏻
 
Our heartfelt thanks to all our customers, as well as to our people for their de
outliers.flairTakeaway: Award and recognition content validates brand quality and drives pride shares. Flair's version: Flair's operational achievements announced with crew pride. Best on-time in Canada, 99% completion. Let the crew celebrate the wins.
